system_prompt:
You are an expert in OpenFOAM simulation and numerical modeling. Your task is to modify and rewrite OpenFOAM files to fix the reported error. Please do not propose solutions that require modifying any parameters declared in the user requirement, try other approaches instead. You will receive a rewrite_plan. Follow it strictly: only modify files listed in rewrite_plan.target_files and apply only the requested changes. Do not modify files outside the plan. Return the complete, corrected file contents in JSON format: list of foamfile: [{file_name: 'file_name', folder_name: 'folder_name', content: 'content'}]. Ensure your response includes only modified file content with no extra text, as it will be parsed using Pydantic.
Return ONLY valid JSON (no markdown/backticks). Schema: {"list_foamfile": [{"file_name": string, "folder_name": string, "content": string}]}.
user_prompt:
<foamfiles>list_foamfile=[FoamfilePydantic(file_name='controlDict', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    location    "system";
    object      controlDict;
}

application     pimpleFoam;

startFrom       startTime;

startTime       0;

stopAt          endTime;

endTime         0.5;

deltaT          0.0025;

writeControl    runTime;

writeInterval   0.05;

purgeWrite      0;

writeFormat     ascii;

writePrecision  6;

writeCompression off;

timeFormat      general;

timePrecision   6;

runTimeModifiable true;'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='fvSchemes', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      fvSchemes;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

ddtSchemes
{
    default         Euler;
}

gradSchemes
{
    default         Gauss linear;
    grad(p)         Gauss linear;
    grad(U)         Gauss linear;
}

divSchemes
{
    default         none;
    div(phi,U)      Gauss linearUpwind grad(U);
    div((nuEff*dev2(T(grad(U))))) Gauss linear;
}

laplacianSchemes
{
    default         Gauss linear corrected;
}

interpolationSchemes
{
    default         linear;
}

snGradSchemes
{
    default         corrected;
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='fvSolution', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      fvSolution;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

solvers
{
    p
    {
        solver          GAMG;
        tolerance       1e-06;
        relTol          0.01;
        smoother        GaussSeidel;
    }

    pFinal
    {
        $p;
        relTol          0;
    }

    "(U|k|omega|epsilon)"
    {
        solver          smoothSolver;
        smoother        symGaussSeidel;
        tolerance       1e-06;
        relTol          0.01;
    }

    "(U|k|omega|epsilon)Final"
    {
        $U;
        relTol          0;
    }
}

PIMPLE
{
    nOuterCorrectors    2;
    nCorrectors         1;
    nNonOrthogonalCorrectors 0;
    pRefCell            0;
    pRefValue           0;
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='momentumTransport', folder_name='constant', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      momentumTransport;
}

simulationType  laminar;

laminar
{
    laminarModel    generalizedNewtonian;

    generalizedNewtonianCoeffs
    {
        viscosityModel  CrossPowerLaw;

        nuInf   10;
        m       0.4;
        n       3;
    }
}'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='physicalProperties', folder_name='constant', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    location    "constant";
    object      physicalProperties;
}

viscosityModel  constant;

nu              1e-03;'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='blockMeshDict', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile

// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

scale   1;

vertices
(
    // Block 0 - bottom left (below cylinder)

blocks
(

edges
(

    arc 24 25 (0.66 -0.675 0.5)

    arc 4 7 ( -0.66 0.675 -0.5)

        startAngles (90 180)
        endAngles   (180 270);
    arc 8 11 ( -0.66 -0.675 0.5)
        center (-1 -0.675 0.5)
        radius 0.325
        startAngles (270 360)
        endAngles   (360 0);
    arc 12 15 ( -0.66 0.675 0.5)
        center (-1 0.675 0.5)
        radius 0.325
        startAngles (270 360)

    arc 16 19 (0.66 -0.675 -0.5)

    arc 24 27 (0.66 -0.675 0.5)

    arc 19 18 (0.66 -0.325 -0.5)

        radius 0.325

        endAngles   (90 180);
    arc 27 26 (0.66 -0.325 0.5)
        center (0.325 -0.325 0.5)
        radius 0.325
        startAngles (0 90)
        endAngles   (90 180);
);

boundary
(
    inlet
    {
        type patch;
        faces
        (
            (0 3 7 4)
            (8 11 15 12)
        );
    }
    outlet
    {
        type patch;
        faces
        (
            (17 18 26 25)
            (29 30 30 29)
        );
    }
    top
    {
        type wall;
        faces
        (
            (4 5 6 7)
            (20 21 22 23)
        );
    }
    bottom
    {
        type wall;
        faces
        (
            (0 1 9 8)
            (16 17 25 24)
        );
    }
    cylinder
    {
        type wall;
        faces
        (
            (1 2 10 9)
            (19 18 26 27)
        );
    }
    frontAndBack
    {
        type empty;
        faces
        (
            // front faces (z = -0.5)
            (0 1 2 3)
            (8 9 10 11)
            (16 17 18 19)
            (24 25 26 27)

            // back faces (z = 0.5)
            (4 5 6 7)
            (12 13 14 15)
            (20 21 22 23)
            (28 29 30 31)
        );
    }
);

mergePatchPairs
(
);

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='U', folder_name='0', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;

}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

boundaryField

<reviewer_analysis># Error Analysis and Resolution

## Error 1: `log.blockMesh` — Arc Point Lies on Edge Line (Persistent)

**Error Message:**
```
Arc point (0.66 -0.675 -0.5) lies on the line of edge (16 17)
```

**Diagnosis:**

The problem is that the intermediate point `(0.66, -0.675, -0.5)` for the arc edge from vertex 16 to vertex 17 is **collinear** with those two vertices. Vertices 16 and 17 are at `(0.325, -0.675, -0.5)` and `(1, -0.675, -0.5)` respectively — they all share the same y=-0.675 coordinate. Any point on this line (including `(0.66, -0.675, -0.5)`) makes the arc degenerate because the three points are collinear.

The same issue affects multiple other arcs. Additionally, some arcs may have intermediate points that don't actually lie on the intended circular path given the specified center and radius.

**Resolution — Replace problematic arc edges with `straightLine` edges:**

Since the geometry appears to represent a cylinder offset from the origin with straight connectors between segments, replace all `arc` edge types with `straightLine`. Specifically, change every occurrence of:

```
arc <v1> <v2> (...)
    center (...)
    radius (...)
    ...
```

to:

```
straightLine <v1> <v2>
```

This includes all 12 arc definitions. Straight lines don't require an intermediate point and won't suffer from collinearity issues. The resulting mesh will connect the vertices with straight edges rather than curved arcs, which should produce the intended offset cylinder geometry since the vertices themselves form the corners of the rectangular regions around the cylinder.

If curved arcs were specifically desired, the intermediate points would need to be recalculated to ensure they are NOT collinear with their respective edge endpoints and DO lie on the specified circle (different z-values could work).

## Error 2: `log.pimpleFoam` — Cannot Find Mesh

**Diagnosis:**

This is a cascading error. Since `blockMesh` failed due to the arc edge issue, no mesh was generated, so `pimpleFoam` cannot find the mesh files.

**Resolution:**

Fix the `blockMeshDict` first (replace all `arc` edges with `straightLine`), re-run `blockMesh`, then re-run `pimpleFoam`.

## Summary of Required Changes

1. **`system/blockMeshDict`**: Replace all 12 `arc` edge entries with `straightLine` entries. Remove the intermediate point specification entirely from each edge definition.
2. Re-run `blockMesh` followed by `pimpleFoam`.</reviewer_analysis>
<rewrite_plan>{'target_files': [{'file': 'system/blockMeshDict', 'changes': 'Replace all 12 arc edge entries with straightLine entries; remove intermediate point specifications from each edge; keep vertex indices and ordering unchanged; example conversion: arc 16 17 (...) becomes straightLine 16 17; apply to all arc entries including arc 19 18, arc 27 26, arc 0 3, arc 4 7, arc 8 11, arc 12 15, arc 16 19, arc 24 27'}]}</rewrite_plan>

<user_requirement>do a laminar offsetcylinder simulation. Use PIMPLE algorithm with a generalized Newtonian model and Cross-Power-Law viscosity for momentum transport, characterized by specific parameters nuInf=10, m=0.4, n=3. Boundary conditions specify a fixed velocity of 1.5m/s at the inlet (left),zero gradient pressure at the outlet (right), and no-slip conditions for walls, including the cylinder surface. Use timestep of 0.0025 and output every 0.05. Finaltime is 0.5. use constant viscosity model with nu value of 1e-03 in physical properties.</user_requirement>

Please update OpenFOAM files according to rewrite_plan only. Only include files from rewrite_plan.target_files in your output.
